text: Hey son, haven't heard from you in a few days. Everything good?
Yeah all good Dad, just been slammed with work. How's Mom doing?
She's fine, nagging me as usual 😄 Don't be a stranger okay, call us this weekend.
Brittany just checking on you, haven't heard from you in a few days 🙏
Sorry mum been mad busy with work. I'm good tho, eating and sleeping I promise lol
Okay good 😊 come home this weekend if you can, I'll make your favourite
yo you coming to mum's on Saturday or nah?
yeah def, was gonna ask if you wanted to carpool. leaving around 11
perfect, swing by mine first i'll have food ready 👌
Bri!! man it's been forever, how you been holding up?
Pat!! not gonna lie life been crazy but I'm good bro, what about you??
same same lol we gotta link up soon fr, you free this weekend?
hey babe, how's your day going? haven't heard from you in a bit 😊
sorry been slammed at work lol, just got a second to breathe. missing you tho 💙
aww that's okay, just wanted to check in. don't forget to eat something!! 😄
hey bri, haven't heard from you in a few days, you good? 👀
yeah sorry been so in my head lol, work's been a lot but i'm okay. how are you??
ugh same honestly 😩 come home soon we need a movie night asap
Hey son, haven't heard from you in a few days. Everything good? (19)

Just sent the Nguyens the updated comps for the Westchase 4BR.
Staging for the Channelside condo wraps Thursday, photos Friday at 10.
Offer came in on the Bayshore listing, reviewing terms now.
Can we push the the Davis Islands waterfront open house to next weekend?
Inspection on the South Tampa bungalow came back clean, minor items only.
the Morales referral want a second showing at the Beach Park home this week.
Price reduction on the Hyde Park townhome is live, updating the sites.
Closing on the Palma Ceia listing is set, sending docs via DocuSign.
Pulled fresh Zestimate range for the Riverview new build before the seller call.
Booked Gabriela for photos at the Seminole Heights 3BR tomorrow morning.
Carlos is staging the Westchase 4BR today, lanai looks great.
Reminder: the Coleman family pre-approval expires soon, following up.
New waterfront lead for Dr. Ramirez, sending details.
Newsletter for past clients goes out Monday.
Costco run done, open-house refreshments restocked.
Zumba at 6, then the pipeline review at 7.
Diego has robotics till 5, adjusting the showing route.
Carmen is bringing dinner over, kids covered tonight.
